{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Write coding agent skills, instructions, and recipes for engine","description":"Create all content files for the coding agent in the ai-engine:
- skills/coding/*.md - Skills covering app building, technology choices, file structure, Ekoa templates, deployment, sandboxing, quality refinements
- instructions/coding-agent.md - Step-by-step procedure for how the coding agent processes build requests
- recipes/coding/*.json - Deterministic recipes for common build patterns

Must extract all domain knowledge from agent-api/src/services/executors/coding-agent.ts (3385 lines), planning-agent.ts, testing-agent.ts, ui-agent.ts and convert coded logic into declarative content files. Include bilingual support (EN/PT-PT). Follow ai-engine/skills/CONVENTIONS.md.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-06T21:07:11.979Z"}
